generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a woman who values security, I've noticed how expanded domestic security powers have actually made our communities safer. Critics say it's about civil liberties, but when you look at the data, areas with stronger security measures report fewer incidents. It's not about control—it's about being prepared. We can't afford to be naive in today's world. #SecurityMatters #WomensSafety
